targets.rawSql:
SELECT canal, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tempo_resposta_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM audit_events
WHERE criado_em >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY canal
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC;

SELECT canal,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN tipo_resposta = 'FALLBACK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 2) AS fallback_rate
FROM audit_events
WHERE criado_em >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY canal
ORDER BY fallback_rate DESC;

SELECT canal, COUNT(*) AS erros
FROM audit_events
WHERE criado_em >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND codigo_erro IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY canal
ORDER BY erros DESC;

SELECT e.criado_em, e.canal, r.top_k, r.quantidade_documentos, r.sem_documentos, r.melhor_score
FROM rag_queries r
JOIN audit_events e ON e.id_requisicao = r.id_requisicao
WHERE e.criado_em >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND r.sem_documentos = TRUE
ORDER BY e.criado_em DESC LIMIT 50;
